# MessMate

> MessMate is a mobile-first hostel mess portal for students and admins — scan QR codes for meals, track attendance, recharge wallets, and manage payments.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Student home with wallet balance, QR scanner, attendance and payment history.
- [Profile](/profile): Student details, hostel info, mess plan, and QR scan statistics.
- [Settings](/settings): Theme, notifications, language, and app preferences.
- [Sign in](/login): Student and admin login.
- [Create account](/signup): New student registration.
- [Reset password](/forgot-password): Recover access using your registration number.
